titleStmt.title: SII 40.166: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 166. (A.R. No. B. 301 of 1931.) Kambhampāḍu, Palnad Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a slab set up in front of the Bhṛiṅgīśvara temple in the village.
This is dated Śaka 1180, Kāḷayukti, Vaiśākha śu. 15, Thursday, corresponding to 1258 A.D., April 19.

Records that a certain Rāyajīvaraksha Samantā-Javara Annaladēva set up the image of Bhaṅgēśvara in the name of his father Bhēyidēva and also gifted some lands for worship to the Sthānapati Sadāśiva-Gurudēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī śakavaruṣaṁbulu 11
80 yagunēṁṭi kāḷayukā
¨rtti saṁvacchara vaiśākha suddha 15 gu
ruvāramunu svasti śrīmatu
mōripaṭṭasaṁbhaviku citracēṁṭi
bharayarāya jīvarakṣasāma
ṁttajavara Annaladēvaḍu tamata
ṁḍri bhayedēvanipēriṭa bhaṁgēsva
radēvara pratiṣṭasēsi dēvara naivēdya
naku niccena vritti velisēnu kha 2 nīru
nēla kālāṁgiseṭṭika¨rttvapuvvula
tōṁṭa 1 dēvarastānāpati sāṁ
sta sivagurudēvara koḍuku sa
dāsivagurudēvaraku Ācaṁdrā
¨rkkamugā niccenaru maṁgaḷama
hā śrī śrī śrī . kāsavāriki vēli
sēnuna 12 svadataṁ paradataṁ vvāyō
hārēti vasuṁdharā ṣaṣṭi¨rvva¨rṣa sahasrā
ṇi vittayā jāyatē krimi
Digital edition of SII 40.166 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
